scripts.dev: echo 'Run BE and FE in separate terminals:' && echo '  npm run dev:be   # backend on :8000' && echo '  npm run dev:fe   # frontend on :5001'
scripts.dev:fe: bash -c 'unset npm_config_prefix && source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 --silent && cd findmyspare && npm run dev -- -p 5001'
scripts.install:all: cd findmyspare-backend && bun install && cd ../findmyspare && npm install
scripts.health: bash -c 'unset npm_config_prefix && source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 --silent && node scripts/health-check.mjs'
scripts.kill: lsof -ti:5001 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; echo 'Ports 5001 & 8000 cleared'
